root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.control_id ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_age(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as agetext_member ,pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as agetext_live ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.approve_date ,'DD MONTH YYYY') as t_approve_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.date_of_birth ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.period_recrieve , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_amount ,sc_mem_m_share_mem.drop_status , ( select sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.dividend from sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.membership_no and sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.account_year = (select max(stock_detail.account_year) from sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail stock_detail where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = stock_detail.membership_no )) as dividend , ( select sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.average_return from sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.membership_no and sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.account_year = (select max(stock_detail.account_year) from sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail stock_detail where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = stock_detail.membership_no )) as average_return , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_loan_balance_by_mem(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as loan_balance FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_share_mem WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no /*WHERE*/

r_tnma_member_detail_nest_member_own_inf.sql: select '' as saving_name , '' as own_work_age ,'' as first_date, '' as first_date_tdate FROM dual WHERE 1 = 1 /*select sc_mem_m_ucf_othersaving.saving_name , sc_mem_m_member_own_info.own_work_age ,sc_mem_m_member_own_info.first_date, '' as first_date_tdate FROM sc_mem_m_member_own_info ไม่มี Table ,sc_mem_m_ucf_othersaving WHERE sc_mem_m_member_own_info.other_saving =sc_mem_m_ucf_othersaving.other_saving_member and sc_mem_m_member_own_info.membership_no = {0}*/

r_tnma_member_detail_nest_member_detail_.sql:
select tab.* from( select sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , sc_lon_m_loan_card.pending_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'dd mon yyyy') as begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , nvl(sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_period , 0) as last_period , '' as collateral_description , '' as collateral_no from sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_contract where ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) or ( ( principal_balance = 0 ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.atm_status = '1' ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_card.close_status is null) ) ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = {0} )
union
SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , sc_lon_m_loan_card.pending_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'dd mon yyyy') as begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount , nvl(sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_period , 0) as last_period , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ||' '|| decode( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code , '01' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description) as collateral_description , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_contract_coll where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and ( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) or ( ( principal_balance = 0 ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.atm_status = '1' ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_card.close_status is null) ) ) and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = {0} )tab where tab.collateral_no is not null order by tab.loan_contract_no , tab.collateral_no

SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, decode( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code , '01' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description) as collateral_description FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' )

SELECT sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ) as membername FROM sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) )

SELECT sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no, pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no , 'XXX-XX-XXXXXXXXXX' ) as from_dep_acc_no, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance, sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name FROM sc_dep_m_creditor, sc_dep_m_rule WHERE ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) and ( ( sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = {0} ) )

SELECT sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.gain_name, sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.gain_surname, sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.rec_no FROM sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename WHERE ( sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( ( sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.gain_status = '0' ) )

SELECT '' as insurance_no, '' as insurance_balance FROM dual WHERE 1 = 1 /*SELECT sc_mem_m_member_insurance.insurance_no, sc_mem_m_member_insurance.insurance_balance FROM sc_mem_m_member_insurance WHERE ( sc_mem_m_member_insurance.membership_no = :as_memno ) AND ( sc_mem_m_member_insurance.insurance_balance > 0 )*/

r_tnma_member_detail_nest_member_refer_2.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_member_member_refer.membership_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_concern.related_na ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_member_member_refer.membership_no) as member_name FROM sc_mem_m_member_member_refer , sc_mem_m_ucf_concern WHERE sc_mem_m_member_member_refer.conceern_code =sc_mem_m_ucf_concern.conceern_code and ( sc_mem_m_member_member_refer.membership_no_ref = {0} )
